rows.label: qev080402_MSG0001
rows.name:
Good grief... Even though they said I could be the boss,
all I do is haggle down the prices of weapons
and gather intel on BLADE...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0002
rows.name:
It's nothing but petty jobs like that...
Haa~... Did I follow the wrong person?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Huh, what is it? The business negotiation is settled,
so if you have something to say, I'll listen, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_JNK0010
rows.name: Kindness

rows.label: qev080402_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say that you'll lend an ear
if Avi has any worries.

rows.label: qev080402_JNK0020
rows.name: Press

rows.label: qev080402_SEL0021
rows.name:
Point out that Avi's true identity
is a Definia.

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0004
rows.name:
What a nice person! You see, recently
I was headhunted by someone
and became the boss of a certain organization, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0005
rows.name:
But when I actually went to that workplace,
there wasn't a single subordinate around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0006
rows.name:
In the end, I'm just being made to do chores
like a servant for Mother—er, my boss.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Eh? Are you saying that boss's name
is Fortun?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0008
rows.name:
Wh-! Wh-wh-wh-wha!
How do you know that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0009
rows.name:
Ah! Could it be that you're
[ST:playername ]?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0010
rows.name: Wh-what are you talking about?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0011
rows.name:
...You say I was seen transforming?!
Where did you hear such a story from...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0012
rows.name:
Wait! Hah!
Could it be that you're [ST:playername ]?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0013
rows.name: Mother warned me to be careful of you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0014
rows.name:
Moreover, I'm totally out of my element here, aren't I?!
Lyvia-chan's biggest pinch![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0015
rows.name: Kugh... If it's come to this! The final resort...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0016
rows.name:
Flee! At top speed!
Ah, Fritz-san, make sure to deliver that stuff right away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0017
rows.name:
Heyyy! Since I'm buying in such massive bulk,
at least make it a little cheaper![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0018
rows.name:
I'm begging you to give me this price
by squeezing it out of my meager funds, you know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0019
rows.name: Right? Pleeese![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Hey, what do you want during a negotiation?
I'm doing an important job right now, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080402_MSG0021
rows.name: If you have some business with me, please do it later.[ST:wait ]
